summary: TriniSaver Zone Changes Testing Complete. Backend: 8/8 tests passed (100%). Frontend: 5/5 tests passed (100%). All requested changes verified: 1) Gas stations removed (404), 2) New T&T zones implemented across all screens (East-West Corridor, North East, West, Central, South, Deep South), 3) Dynamic store loading + Add New Store feature working with points rewards, 4) Duplicate store validation working.
critical_code_review_comments: ✅ All stores in database have new T&T zone names (East-West Corridor, South, Central, West, North East)
✅ POST /api/auth/register accepts all new zone names including 'Deep South' and 'East-West Corridor'
✅ POST /api/stores creates new stores, awards 5 points, requires authentication
✅ POST /api/stores correctly rejects duplicate store names (case-insensitive)
✅ POST /api/stores validates required fields (name cannot be empty)
✅ Existing test user (test_zone@test.com) still works with Deep South region
✅ Auth screen region selector shows all 6 new zones
✅ Home dashboard has NO gas station section (successfully removed from UI)
✅ Compare screen dynamically loads stores from backend API
✅ Compare screen has 'Add New Store' button at bottom of store selector modal
✅ Add New Store modal includes zone selector with all 6 new regions
✅ Community screen region filters show all 6 new zones
✅ Profile screen region selector shows all 6 new zones
✅ All frontend screens correctly display and use new T&T zone names
seed_data_creation: Frontend testing created 1 test user (test_zone_8e9337@test.com) with Deep South region. Backend testing created 3 additional test users and 2 new test stores to verify POST /api/stores functionality.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All zone changes successfully implemented and tested. Gas stations fully removed from backend and frontend. New T&T zones (East-West Corridor, North East, West, Central, South, Deep South) are working correctly across all screens. Dynamic store loading and add new store feature working with proper auth and points rewards. All incremental changes verified against iteration_1 baseline.
